title: Slovakian Shrimp Braised in White Wine
description: A flavorful Slovakian-inspired dish featuring succulent shrimp in a rich, white wine braising liquid.
instructions: Heat the white wine in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the Slovakian paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
Add the white wine vinegar, ice-cold water, salt, and pepper to the skillet.
Bring the liquid to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until slightly reduced.
Return the shrimp to the skillet and coat with the braising liquid.
Serve the shrimp hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over egg noodles, if desired.
